message:
Running command: # Get register info for all relevant IPs
echo "=== CRC ==="
grep -n "localparam.*ADDR\|12'h" /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/ip/NC_CRC/rtl/nc_crc_apb.v 2>/dev/null | head -20
echo "=== AES ==="
grep -n "localparam.*ADDR\|PADDR" /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/ip/NC_AES/rtl/nc_aes.v 2>/dev/null | head -20
echo "=== TMR ==="
grep -n "localparam.*ADDR\|12'h" /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/ip/NC_TMR/rtl/nc_tmr.v 2>/dev/null | head -20
echo "=== WWDT ==="
grep -n "localparam.*ADDR\|12'h" /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/ip/NC_WWDT/rtl/nc_wwdt.v 2>/dev/null | head -20
echo "=== RTC ==="
grep -n "localparam.*ADDR\|12'h" /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/ip/NC_RTC/rtl/nc_rtc.v 2>/dev/null | head -20
echo "=== PWM ==="
grep -n "localparam.*ADDR\|12'h" /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/ip/NC_PWM/rtl/nc_pwm.v 2>/dev/null | head -20
